payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Polished stainless-steel rectangular sink basin with a reflective interior showing distorted reflections, partially cropped at the right/foreground edges and set into a beige-brown stone countertop; a faucet spout is visible at the top-right edge and the basin shows small water residue — photograph appears to be a close-up from about 0.6 m.

message.content: {"label":"sink","short_description":"polished stainless rectangular sink edge-crop","long_description":"Polished stainless-steel rectangular sink basin with a reflective interior showing distorted reflections, partially cropped at the right/foreground edges and set into a beige-brown stone countertop; a faucet spout is visible at the top-right edge and the basin shows small water residue — photograph appears to be a close-up from about 0.6 m.","attributes":["stainless steel","rectangular basin","polished reflective surface","partial/edge-cropped","installed in stone countertop","faucet visible at top-right","water residue/reflection","close-up view"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
